title: Big Tech is obsessed with smart glasses. Now it has to convince people to wear them.
summary: Smart glasses represent a potential breakthrough hardware for the AI era, but manufacturers must overcome consumer adoption barriers. Major tech companies are betting these devices will become essential, though market acceptance remains uncertain.
content: Smart glasses could become the definitive hardware design of the AI era — if consumers buy in to the idea.

zh.title: 大科技公司对智能眼镜着迷。现在它必须说服人们戴上它们。
zh.summary: 智能眼镜代表了人工智能时代一个潜在的硬件突破，但制造商必须克服消费者采用的障碍。主要科技公司押注这些设备将成为必需品，尽管市场接受度仍然不确定。

title: The memory shortage shaking Apple and Microsoft is 'existential crisis' for smaller players
summary: A surge in memory chip costs is forcing Apple and Microsoft to raise device prices, but the shortage poses an existential threat to smaller consumer electronics companies with less financial flexibility. The memory supply crunch is reshaping the competitive landscape of the tech industry.
content: While Apple and Microsoft raise prices on key devices to help cover the soaring costs of memory, smaller consumer electronics companies are in dire straits.

zh.title: 影响苹果和微软的内存短缺对小型企业来说是"生存危机"
zh.summary: 内存芯片成本的激增迫使苹果和微软提高设备价格，但这种短缺对财务灵活性较低的小型消费电子公司构成了生存威胁。内存供应短缺正在重塑科技行业的竞争格局。

title: Bank of America says these five stocks are best positioned for upside amid market uncertainty
summary: Bank of America analysts have identified five stocks they believe offer significant growth potential despite current market volatility. The stocks are positioned to benefit from broader market dynamics as uncertainty persists.
content: Analysts at Bank of America said these stocks have plenty of room to run.

zh.title: 美国银行表示这五只股票在市场不确定性中最有上升潜力
zh.summary: 美国银行分析师确定了五只股票，他们认为尽管当前市场波动，这些股票提供重大增长潜力。这些股票位置可以从更广泛的市场动态中受益，因为不确定性持续存在。

title: Straight women can’t get enough of gay romance stories like ‘Heated Rivalry’ and ‘Red, White & Royal Blue’
summary: Gay romance stories are experiencing explosive popularity among straight women readers, expanding the genre beyond its traditional audience. The trend reflects shifting reading habits and growing mainstream acceptance of LGBTQ+ narratives in popular culture.
content: Women aren't the protagonists or love interests in a subgrenre of romance focused on gay men. Still, they're consuming these stories in droves.

zh.title: 异性恋女性对《激情对峙》和《红白蓝色皇室爱情》等男男爱情故事爱不释手
zh.summary: 男男爱情故事在异性恋女性读者中获得了爆炸性的欢迎,将这一类型扩展到其传统受众之外。这一趋势反映了阅读习惯的转变和主流文化对LGBTQ+叙事的日益接受。

title: Trading in these two ETFs suggests inflation fears are overblown
summary: Recent ETF trading patterns suggest market participants believe inflation concerns may be overstated. However, crude oil volatility is complicating the typical signals that would confirm this thesis.
content: It could have been a big week for bond bears, if it weren't for crude oil.

zh.title: 这两只交易所交易基金的交易表明通胀担忧可能被过度夸大
zh.summary: 最近的交易所交易基金交易模式表明市场参与者认为通胀担忧可能被言过其实。然而,原油波动性使得通常会确认这一论点的信号变得复杂。

title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel sworn in as U.S. citizen at baseball game
summary: Berkshire Hathaway CEO Greg Abel became a U.S. citizen in a naturalization ceremony at an Iowa Cubs baseball game, completing a longtime transition from his Canadian birthplace. The ceremony represented one of dozens of international residents taking citizenship oaths.
content: Abel, a longtime Iowa resident who was born in the Canadian city of Edmonton in 1962, was among the roughly two dozen people from 16 countries who participated in an annual naturalization ceremony hosted by the Iowa Cubs Thursday night in Des Moines.

zh.title: 伯克希尔首席执行官格雷格·艾贝尔在棒球比赛上宣誓成为美国公民
zh.summary: 伯克希尔哈撒韦首席执行官格雷格·艾贝尔在爱荷华小熊队棒球比赛上的入籍仪式中成为美国公民,完成了从其加拿大出生地长期以来的过渡。该仪式是数十名国际居民宣誓入籍的其中之一。

title: How GE Vernova builds the massive gas turbines powering the AI data center boom
summary: GE Vernova's industrial gas turbines have become critical infrastructure for powering the surging energy demands of AI data centers. Major tech companies including Elon Musk's xAI and Microsoft are buying these turbines to fuel their massive computing operations.
content: GE Vernova turbines are powering Elon Musk's xAI Colossus 1 data center and Microsoft just bought seven to power its data center in Texas.

zh.title: 通用电气Vernova如何打造驱动AI数据中心热潮的巨型燃气轮机
zh.summary: 通用电气Vernova的工业燃气轮机已成为满足AI数据中心激增能源需求的关键基础设施。包括埃隆·马斯克的xAI和微软在内的主要科技公司正在购买这些轮机为其大规模计算运营提供动力。

title: How Kohl's lost its way — and is trying to become relevant again
summary: Kohl's department store chain has suffered a dramatic decline from its position as a major retailer, losing both market relevance and its traditional customer base. The company is now undertaking a turnaround effort to rebuild its brand and competitive position.
content: Kohl's went from a household name to a plunging stock as it lost relevancy and its core customer. Now, the company is trying to turn itself around.

zh.title: 科尔百货如何走向衰落——以及如何重新获得市场地位
zh.summary: 零售连锁店科尔百货从主要零售商的地位大幅衰落，既失去了市场相关性，也失去了传统客户基础。该公司现正实施转型计划以重建品牌和竞争地位。

title: Alliant Credit Union's new checking account pays up to 2% APY — see how it stacks up
summary: Alliant Credit Union has launched a high-yield checking account offering up to 2% annual percentage yield with unlimited earnings potential. The product represents a competitive option for savers seeking better returns on cash deposits.
content: Alliant Credit Union's new jumbo high-rate checking account pays up to 2% APY with no cap on earnings. Here's what to know.

zh.title: Alliant信用合作社新支票账户最高2% APY——与其他产品的比较
zh.summary: Alliant信用合作社推出高收益支票账户，提供高达2%的年利率和无限收益潜力。该产品对于寻求现金存款更高回报的储户而言是一个具有竞争力的选择。

title: SpaceX’s new $11 billion ‘saving grace’ comes with a big catch
summary: SpaceX is pursuing an $11 billion opportunity by providing hardware access to competitors, but the strategy may undermine its own artificial intelligence ambitions. The move represents a strategic trade-off between near-term revenue and long-term AI dominance.
content: The company’s pivot toward offering hardware access to rivals could hamstring its own AI goals.

zh.title: SpaceX新推出的110亿美元'救星'方案隐藏巨大代价
zh.summary: SpaceX正在寻求通过向竞争对手提供硬件访问权来获得110亿美元的机会，但这一战略可能会削弱其人工智能野心。这一举措代表了短期收益与长期人工智能主导地位之间的战略权衡。

title: It’s a tale of two S&P 500s as rotation out of top tech stocks shifts into overdrive
summary: A significant rotation away from large-cap technology stocks has widened the performance gap between the equal-weighted and market-cap-weighted versions of the S&P 500 to its largest in six years. The trend suggests investors are rebalancing away from mega-cap dominance.
content: The equal-weighted version of the S&P 500 outperformed its traditional capitalization-weighted sibling this week by the widest margin in six years.

zh.title: 标普500指数的'双重'故事：科技股轮动加速演进
zh.summary: 大幅轮出大型科技股已将标普500指数等权版本与市值加权版本之间的表现差距扩大至六年最高水平。这一趋势表明投资者正在调整配置，远离超大盘股的主导地位。

title: China industrial profits stay resilient as economy leans on factories, exports
summary: Chinese industrial profits continue to hold steady despite broader economic weakness, as the country's economy increasingly relies on manufacturing and export sectors. However, growth remains fragile, constrained by a struggling property market and structural imbalances.
content: China's economic growth remains fragile, hobbled by a prolonged property downturn and deep structural imbalances.

zh.title: 中国工业利润保持韧性，经济愈加依赖工业和出口
zh.summary: 尽管经济总体面临弱势，中国工业利润仍保持稳健，因为该国经济日益依赖制造业和出口部门。但增长仍然脆弱，受困于房地产市场疲软和结构性失衡。

title: Saudi Aramco resumes oil loading at Ras Tanura in boost to supply
summary: Saudi Aramco has restarted oil loading operations at its Ras Tanura facility, providing relief to global energy supplies. The resumption comes despite regional tensions highlighted by an incident involving a Taiwan-registered vessel in the strategic Strait of Hormuz.
content: The Saudi oil loadings come even though a ship belonging to Taiwan's Evergreen Marine was hit by an unknown object in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday.

zh.title: 沙特阿美在拉斯坦杜拉恢复石油装运以增加供应
zh.summary: 沙特阿美已重启其拉斯坦杜拉设施的石油装运业务，为全球能源供应提供缓解。尽管发生了台湾籍船只在战略性霍尔木兹海峡事件导致的地区紧张局势，装运仍得以恢复。

title: Venezuela quake toll tops 900, search intensifies for hundreds trapped
summary: A major earthquake in Venezuela has killed over 900 people with hundreds still trapped under rubble. The disaster has exposed uneven relief efforts in the hardest-hit areas, creating frustration over the pace of recovery operations.
content: Frustration has mounted over the uneven pace of relief in some of the hardest-hit areas.

zh.title: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数超900人，搜救工作加紧寻找数百名被困者
zh.summary: 委内瑞拉发生大地震，已造成900多人丧生，数百人仍被埋在废墟下。这场灾难暴露了最受灾地区救援工作参差不齐，引发了人们对救灾进度缓慢的不满。

title: From concerts to train rides, bots are winning the ticket wars — but they're only part of the problem
summary: Automated bots are increasingly used to scalp tickets across concerts, train reservations, and other events, defeating efforts by consumers to purchase fairly. The issue highlights how technology is being weaponized against traditional ticket distribution systems.
content: From concerts to train reservations, automated bots have become the latest target in the fight against ticket scalping.

zh.title: 从演唱会到火车票，机器人正在赢得票务战争——但它们只是问题的一部分
zh.summary: 自动化机器人越来越多地被用于在演唱会、火车订票和其他活动中倒卖票务，打破了消费者公平购票的努力。这个问题突出了技术是如何被用来对抗传统票务分销系统的。

title: Red-alert heatwaves are becoming Europe's new normal. Investors are paying attention
summary: Europe is experiencing unprecedented heat waves with temperature records being broken across the continent and governments issuing critical danger-to-life warnings. Investors are increasingly recognizing climate-related risks as extreme weather events become more frequent and severe.
content: Temperature records were smashed across Europe this week, prompting several countries across the continent to issued high-level warnings about danger to life.

zh.title: 红色预警热浪正成为欧洲的新常态。投资者正在关注
zh.summary: 欧洲正经历前所未有的热浪，整个大陆的温度记录被打破，政府发布了关键的生命危险警告。随着极端天气事件变得更加频繁和严重，投资者越来越认识到气候相关风险。

title: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies, government agencies
summary: Anthropic disabled access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models due to government export control directives, but the Trump administration is allowing selective release of the Mythos model to certain companies and government agencies. The decision reflects tensions between national security restrictions and commercial AI competition.
content: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with a government export control directive citing "national security authorities."

zh.title: 特朗普政府允许Anthropic公司向部分企业和政府机构发布Mythos AI模型
zh.summary: 由于政府出口管制指令，Anthropic公司禁用了对Fable 5和Mythos 5模型的访问，但特朗普政府允许向特定企业和政府机构有选择地发布Mythos模型。这一决定反映了国家安全限制与商业AI竞争之间的紧张关系。

title: SpaceX will join Nasdaq-100
summary: SpaceX is being added to the Nasdaq-100 index, making it one of the first companies to benefit from Nasdaq's newly adopted fast-track inclusion framework. The milestone represents significant public market recognition for Elon Musk's space company.
content: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

zh.title: SpaceX将加入纳斯达克100指数
zh.summary: SpaceX被纳入纳斯达克100指数，成为首批受益于纳斯达克新推快速纳入框架的公司之一。这一里程碑代表了公开市场对埃隆·马斯克太空公司的重大认可。
